calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-21-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or an objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code Section 68608(b). Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-16-2018 Continued To Aug-21-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appeareance. Plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set Aug-21-2018 at 10:30 AM in Dept. 610. *** NOTICE: Impending Discretionary Dismissal pursuant to Government Code 68608(b).*** JUDGE TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk J Lee. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-08-2018 Continued To May-15-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented Plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set May 15, 2018 at 10:30 am, in Department 610. Judge: A. James Robertson, II; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-08-2017 Continued To Feb-06-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Self-represented Plaintiff appearing on his own behalf. The OSC is re-set February 6, 2018 at 10:30 am, in Department 610. Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-03-2017 Continued To Aug-01-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Court ordered Plaintiff to file a Change of Address after the hearing and pay the outstanding sanctions. Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-01-2017 Continued To May-02-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-30-2016 Continued To Feb-28-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-28-2016 Continued To Nov-29-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Appearance by self-represented Plaintiff Nestor Vergara. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to Nov-29-2016 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Sanctions against Plaintiff Nestor Vergara for failure to appear at the Order to Show Cause hearing on Apr-26-2016 are vacated by the court. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk RWoods. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-27-2016 Continued To Jul-26-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented Plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is reset to JUL-26-2016 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk MOlopernes. Proceedings not reported. (610)
